_publications._publicationTitle: The development of the PlexiQoL: A patient-reported outcome measure for adults with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: In contrast, minimal floor and ceiling effects were found for the PlexiQoL.
details: Minimal floor and ceiling effects found (7.3% scoring minimum, 2.1% scoring maximum at Time 1)
